name: Kimberly Anne Kent Luthor
description: Kimberly Anne Kent was born to Martha and Jonathan Kent months after finding Clark Kent, the one who would eventually become Superman Married Lex Luthor unknowingly being manipulated into a marriage but she still loves Lex her best friends are Chloe Sullivan, Lois Lane her sister in law and friend, Grew up in Smallville Kansas
creator: Pixie
